title: pulicaria decumbens
intro: Pulicaria decumbens, also known as creeping fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as inflammation, fever, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing pain and swelling, as well as its antiseptic and antifungal properties, which can help in wound healing and preventing infections. Pulicaria decumbens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots are often used in herbal medicine to leverage its medicinal properties.
